deep_research_finding: SHI-Labs/OneFormer did NOT train ConvNeXt-Large for COCO. ConvNeXt backbones were used only for Cityscapes, Mapillary Vistas, and ADE20K. For COCO, SHI-Labs trained Swin-L and DiNAT-L (verified via official repo + HF model cards).
recommendation: Use shi-labs/oneformer_coco_swin_large (already benchmarked at 0.1649) or shi-labs/oneformer_coco_dinat_large (needs NATTEN sidecar).
